summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Advanced Dashboard Intelligence features. Backend: 20/20 API tests passed. Frontend: All 4 intelligence dashboard components working correctly - DailyWinnersPanel, MarketRadar, OpportunityWatchlist, AlertsPanel with tabbed interface.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/daily-winners returns 200 with proper structure
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/daily-winners?limit=N respects limit parameter
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/market-radar returns 200 with proper structure
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/market-radar?limit=N respects limit parameter
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/watchlist without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/watchlist with auth returns 200
Backend: POST /api/dashboard/watchlist adds product to watchlist
Backend: POST /api/dashboard/watchlist duplicate returns 400
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/watchlist/check/{product_id} returns correct status
Backend: DELETE /api/dashboard/watchlist/{product_id} removes product
Backend: DELETE /api/dashboard/watchlist/{invalid_id} returns 404
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/alerts without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/alerts with auth returns 200 with unread_count
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/alerts?limit=N respects limit parameter
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/alerts?unread_only=true filters correctly
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/summary (public) returns daily_winners and market_radar
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/summary (auth) includes watchlist_preview and unread_alerts
Frontend: Dashboard page loads with Intelligence Dashboard section
Frontend: Intelligence Dashboard has 4 tabs (Winners, Radar, Watchlist, Alerts)
Frontend: Daily Winners tab displays DailyWinnersPanel with products and launch recommendations
Frontend: Market Radar tab displays MarketRadar with category clusters and opportunity scores
Frontend: Watchlist tab shows sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users
Frontend: Alerts tab shows sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users
critical_code_review_comments: All dashboard endpoints properly implemented with correct auth requirements
Watchlist and Alerts correctly require authentication while daily-winners and market-radar are public
Market Radar correctly groups products by category and calculates cluster-level metrics
Watchlist stores initial snapshots for change tracking over time
seed_data_creation: Watchlist tests created and cleaned up test entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Intelligence features fully tested. APIs: /api/dashboard/daily-winners (public), /api/dashboard/market-radar (public), /api/dashboard/watchlist (auth required), /api/dashboard/alerts (auth required). Frontend: DashboardPage.jsx has Intelligence Dashboard section with 4 tabs. Demo mode requires Supabase to be disabled. Supabase auth may be rate-limited.

mocked_apis.Data Sources: SIMULATED - TikTok, Amazon, AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping data is simulated
mocked_apis.Intelligence Layer: RULES-BASED - Uses deterministic scoring algorithms, not external LLM

features_tested.daily_winners: Working - Returns top products ranked by composite score (success_probability, trend_velocity, margin, competition)
features_tested.market_radar: Working - Groups products by category with cluster-level opportunity scores
features_tested.watchlist_crud: Working - Add/remove/check with initial snapshot for change tracking
features_tested.alerts: Working - List with read/unread filtering and mark-as-read functionality
features_tested.dashboard_tabs: Working - Tabbed interface for Winners, Radar, Watchlist, Alerts
